steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Multiply the first equation by 10: $25x-2y=480$. Add to $x+2y=-12$: $$26x=468 \Rightarrow x=18, \ y=\tfrac{-12-18}{2}=-15.$$

steps.title: Find the value of $x + y$
steps.content: Then $x+y=18+(-15)=3$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice C, 3. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
